steps.instruction:
Buy Red Mushroom &b%1%&r
Buy Brown Mushroom &b%2%&r

Buy Oak Logs &b%1%&r
Buy Sticks &b%2%&r
Buy Wooden Sword &b%3%&r
Buy Wooden Shovel &b%4%&r

Enchant items
&eHave a friend splash you
&e            OR
&e1. Swap to main profile
&e2. Join a hub-selector hub
&e3. Throw a titanic in a corner
&e4. Collect xp on bingo profile
Give All Skills Exp Boost to Bingo
steps.criteria: Your pet is now holding All Skills Exp Boost.
[NPC] Michael: Go talk to him if you want to learn more!
[NPC] Ike: Talk to me again if you want to check your progress!

steps.instruction:
Get Move Jerry Eggs &b%1%&r
&7&oDrop eggs as you get them

Add Jerry to Pet Menu
&7&oHold item and Right-Click
steps.criteria: Successfully added Jerry to your pet menu!

steps.instruction:

&7&oHold item and Right-Click
steps.criteria: Successfully added Silverfish to your pet menu!

steps.instruction:
Unlock Mushroom Collection 2
&7&oUse gold axe on big mushrooms

Unlock Mushroom Collection 4
&7&oUse gold axe on big mushrooms

steps.criteria: You can now fly for 2 minutes.

steps.instruction: Apply Black Diamond to Gold Pickaxe
Apply Black Diamond to Gold Pickaxe
Apply Black Diamond to Gold Pickaxe

Craft Enchanted Coal &b%1%&r
&7&oTrade Oak Logs for Coal

steps.criteria: [NPC] Fetchur: thanks thats probably what i needed
